column1: Hey Urmi, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Hi our break is February 28th to March 9th
Cool I got you. Which destination were you lookin to book?
Yea Cancun is dope for sure. How many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
yoo Urmi whats the best email to send the Cancun options to
We have 4 people from umich one from northeastern and one from Carnegie Mellon
And could you send it to urmij@umich.edu
oh bet, we got groups from both schools rollin with us
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Yup we got it! We would like to book Cancun 5 nights
Awesome lets do it. I'll add the booze cruise in there too since we're booking today
is march 1st to 6th okay? we can also do the 28th if thats better for you
cool will send this in a sec!
Hey we are filling out the portal today but one of my friends wants to leave one day early is that ok?
Hey my b I missed that
Yea they can leave early, just have them every their flight details into their portal so our ops team has their transportation set for the correct day
Can you let Aashi know to add her flight info onto her account so we can set up her airport transportation
Hi Spiffy, given what's happening in Cancun do you think it's still safe to go? If not my group and I were wondering if we could switch to a different destination?

yoo Urmi whats good. yea at the moment there isnt a travel ban or any US government restrictions in place for Cancun travel. most of the media you've seen or heard is from other areas of Mexico and no where near the hotel zone where our trips take place
One of my group members is still concerned about the situation, would it be possible for us to move the reservation to somewhere outside Mexico?
Hey Spiffy just follow up on this^
yoo sorry I missed this, we could switch you guys over to punta cana, but it is going to incur a $400 per person fee
Ok I talked to my group and Nitya won't be coming on the trip anymore but the rest of us will be there!
Also just wanted to confirm do we also have the booze cruise?
okay all good. and yea you all have the booze cruise!
hey do we have Aashi's flight info?
Oh I thought Aashi told You or the tour group but she's no longer coming
And Nitya also is not coming
So it's me Devisi Ella and Radha
did y'all want to consolidate into one room? or keep as is
if you keep as is, one of you can go stay with Devisi after check in. so you each get your own bed
Would it be cheaper to consolidate or no?
At this point it wouldn't change any pricing
Actually think Nitya is still undecided if she will come and is making a game time decision so yes two rooms would be good
